Empowering

Empowering
Your Business

Doña Alejandra, Inc. (DAI) is a prominent player in the ICT sector, having solidified its position since its establishment in 2007 in Quezon City.

Committed to excellence and guided by transparency, accountability, and good governance, DAI sets new standards in ICT service delivery across the Philippines.

Who We Are

A trusted ICT partner — committed to transparency, accountability, and good governance since 2007.

17Years in Business+
8Core Services
QCQuezon City HQ
PHProudly Filipino
Our History

How We Got Here

2007

DAI Was Founded

Established in Quezon City with a bold vision to deliver innovative ICT solutions grounded in transparency and good governance.

2010 – 2015

Service Expansion

Expanded into cybersecurity, cloud hosting, and hardware distribution — growing a diverse clientele across government and private sectors.

2016 – 2020

Global Certifications

Established internationally certified partnerships recognized by CCPIT and CCOIC, solidifying DAI's credibility on the world stage.

2021 – Present

Continued Innovation

Launched CloudPH and expanded into LED walls, interactive kiosks, smart boards, and biometric systems.

Who We Are
Who We Are

We are an ICT solutions company backed by experienced professionals — committed to helping private companies operate efficiently and assisting government agencies in delivering faster, more effective public services.

⚙️
What We Do
What We Do

DAI empowers businesses through a wide range of ICT products — from software development and cybersecurity to cloud hosting, hardware, and consumables. We bridge technology gaps across all sectors.

💡
How We Help
How We Help

We focus on system automation and integration that expedite processes and transactions — reinforcing the ease of doing business across the Philippines and beyond.

Our Mission

Sustainable Future

Our mission is to build a sustainable and future-ready society by providing smart ICT solutions to empower businesses and partners to expedite and streamline their processes — with full accountability and transparency.

Our Vision

Digital Transformation

Our vision is to revolutionize ways of life towards greater digital transformation through innovative software solutions — building a more transparent, accountable, and efficient Philippines.

🌏
Mission & Vision

Our Purpose

Towards transparency, accountability, and good governance

Corporate Principles

Our Values

🎯

Purpose

Everything we do is driven by a clear purpose — to empower businesses through technology and create lasting societal impact.

✅

Accountability

We take full ownership of our commitments, delivering on promises with integrity and transparency.

🤝

Collaboration

True innovation happens together. We co-create solutions with clients that truly work in the real world.

⚡

Technology

We embrace the latest advancements to stay ahead of the curve and deliver future-ready ICT solutions.

Cybersecurity Solutions

CloudPH — Philippine Managed Cloud

Join Our Team

We're always seeking passionate, driven people who have what it takes to make an impact through technology.

Why DAI?

Be Part Of Something Big

At Doña Alejandra, Inc., we believe great technology is built by great people. We foster an environment where innovation thrives and every team member is empowered to make a difference.

We are always seeking passionate team members who have what it takes to make an impact and build a better society through technology.
